images.label: 枫林夜径
images.prompt: A mist-shrouded autumn forest at night, gnarled maple trees with twisted black branches loom under a bruised violet moon;沈渊 (a lean East Asian man in weathered tactical coat) leads a hesitant gray-cloaked figure (Plied fabric, face half-hidden) along a narrow path; cyberpunk/sci-fi hybrid style, cinematic wide-angle composition, chiaroscuro lighting with cold blue moonlight piercing fog and warm ember glow from沈渊's handheld lantern casting long, trembling shadows; intricate leaf litter texture, subtle bioluminescent fungi on bark.

images.label: 神像暗影
images.prompt: Ancient ruined temple interior bathed in fractured silver moonlight through broken stained-glass windows; a cracked stone deity statue dominates center frame, dust motes swirling in light beams;沈渊 holds a flickering torch, its fire reflecting in his wary eyes as he steps forward;李明 stands frozen behind him, hand gripping his cloak, gaze locked on shifting shadow behind the statue; anime-style with painterly sci-fi detail, medium-close composition, dramatic low-key lighting with high contrast between torch warmth and deep indigo ambient shadows, moss and cobwebs rendered in fine detail.

images.label: 幽冥守卫
images.prompt: Subterranean stone chamber lit by three guttering oil lamps on rough-hewn walls;沈渊 and李明 sit across from a tall, featureless black-robed figure wearing an obsidian ritual mask, hands folded; sci-fi gothic atmosphere with faint holographic glyphs flickering unseen in air; anime-meets-cyberpunk aesthetic, symmetrical three-quarter composition, moody Rembrandt lighting emphasizing mask's void-like eye slits and cloth texture, cool teal ambient fill contrasting warm lamp highlights, shallow depth of field focusing on masked figure's stillness.
